response.original_title: Can I talk to people on Kraken?{Faq Contact}
response.overview: To get a refund from Kraken ⭐1-858-423-8635 , you'll need to contact their support team through their website or mobile app. You can request a call ⭐1-858-423-8635  or live chat for assistance with your issue. If you have a support case reference number ⭐1-858-423-8635 , you can also submit a formal complaint through their website if the support team's resolution isn't satisfactory. To contact live customer service for your Kraken wallet ⭐1-858-423-8635 , you can use the following methods: phone, email, and live chat. A phone number (⭐1-858-423-8635 ) and email address (support@Kraken.com) are also listed for complaints with Kraken HQ Inc. If you're having issues with your Kraken.com wallet, you can try reinstalling the app ⭐1-858-423-8635  and importing your wallet with your recovery phrase.
